testsuite.name: BullsCowsTest
testsuite.system-out: ?[1;31m Start test 1?[0m Please, enter the secret code's length: > 1 Input the number of possible symbols in the code: > 10 Okay, let's start the game! The secret is prepared: * (0-9) Turn 1: > 0 Grade: None. Turn 2: > 1 Grade: None. Turn 3: > 2 Grade: None. Turn 4: > 3 Grade: None. Turn 5: > 4 Grade: None. Turn 6: > 5 Grade: None. Turn 7: > 6 Grade: 1 bulls. Congratulations! You guessed the secret code. ?[1;31m Start test 2?[0m Please, enter the secret code's length: > 4 Input the number of possible symbols in the code: > 10 Okay, let's start the game!
